Headline: Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Some Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following earlier police activity at Oak Park. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Some Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following earlier police activity at Oak Park. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
